recommendations.title: Dil Dhadakne Do
recommendations.overview: On a cruise to celebrate their parents' 30th wedding anniversary, a brother and sister deal with the impact of family considerations on their romantic lives.

recommendations.title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara
recommendations.overview: Three friends who were inseparable in childhood decide to go on a three-week-long bachelor road trip to Spain, in order to re-establish their bond and explore thrilling adventures, before one of them gets married. What will they learn of themselves a

recommendations.title: Lust Stories
recommendations.overview: An anthology of four stories that sheds light on modern relationships from the viewpoint of the Indian woman.
recommendations.director: Karan Johar, Zoya Akhtar, Anurag Kashyap, Dibakar Banerjee

recommendations.title: Pink Floyd: The Wall
recommendations.overview: A troubled rock star descends into madness in the midst of his physical and social isolation from everyone.

recommendations.title: The Anthem of the Heart
recommendations.overview: A young girl had her voice magically taken away so that she would never hurt people with it, but her outlook changes when she encounters music and friendship. Will Naruse be able to convey the anthem of her heart?

recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.

recommendations.title: All the Mornings of the World
recommendations.overview: Following the death of his wife, a renowned musician ostracises himself from the outer world and dedicates his life to music. However, his life changes when a young man approaches him to learn music.

recommendations.title: My All American
recommendations.overview: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

recommendations.title: ariana grande: excuse me, i love you
recommendations.overview: Ariana Grande takes the stage in London for her Sweetener World Tour and shares a behind-the-scenes look at her life in rehearsal and on the road.

recommendations.title: Sparkle
